name: 第3章第1話の夕景食事処背景
prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic environment image for a modern web novel. Emphasize atmosphere, lighting, believable architecture, realistic materials, and a unified live-action visual language shared with all other generated assets. Cinematic dusk riverside dining spot near White Heron River. Show a modest but elegant exterior terrace, amber bridge lights beginning to appear, reflections on the water, early evening sky, and the feeling of a quiet reservation kept by a careful regular. The tone should be intimate, warm, and gently rewarding after a full holiday. Final delivery will be cropped to 1920x1080. Keep the main focal area centered with safe margins and leave enough side information for widescreen composition. Negative prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, character close-up, deformed architecture, low detail, combat, action pose, readable text, collage, split panel, heavy crowd, obvious threat, loud nightlife district, neon overload
